title: alchemilla ellenbeckii subsp. nyikensis
intro: Alchemilla ellenbeckii subsp. nyikensis is a plant species belonging to the Rosaceae family, commonly known as alpine lady's mantle. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine, and it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The medicinal properties of Alchemilla ellenbeckii subsp. nyikensis are believed to provide various health benefits, such as soothing skin irritations and wounds, reducing swelling, and potentially aiding in the management of menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of the plant may include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are often used to address topical and internal health issues, although further research is necessary to confirm its effectiveness.
